---
name: Asset request
about: Request a new Agent Mesh visual asset
title: "[Asset]: "
labels: asset-request

---

## Asset Type

Choose one:

- [ ] Station
- [ ] Room
- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Effect
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Icon
- [ ] Background
- [ ] Prop
- [ ] Other

## Asset Name / Subject

Example:

```text
station_t5810_ai_flagship
room_snifferops_radar
agent_engineer
effect_ssh_beam
```

## Needed States

- [ ] idle
- [ ] busy
- [ ] warning
- [ ] error
- [ ] offline
- [ ] selected
- [ ] hover
- [ ] active
- [ ] complete
- [ ] failed
- [ ] other: 

## Purpose

What real machine, service, task, state, or UI behavior does this asset represent?

## Visual Direction

Describe the look.

## Size / Format

Preferred format:

- [ ] PNG transparent
- [ ] WebP optimized
- [ ] SVG
- [ ] Concept sheet first

## References

Link related docs, prompts, or concept sheets.

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `STYLE_GUIDE.md`
- [ ] Follows `ASSET_NAMING.md`
- [ ] No baked text
- [ ] No copyrighted logos/characters
- [ ] Lightweight enough for runtime use
